risks.title: Duplicate event processing in code-observer
risks.evidence: Four events detected for same file (Security.tsx) with timestamps within 17ms; relevance scores vary from 0.2 to 0.95, suggesting overlapping detection logic
risks.recommendedAction: Audit code-observer deduplication logic; add timestamp-based windowing (e.g., 100ms) to collapse identical file change events

risks.title: Security module changes lack verification workflow
risks.evidence: Security.tsx has been modified but no mention of security test execution or review completion in events
risks.recommendedAction: Establish mandatory security test run and code review before merging changes to security-related files

opportunities.title: Improve event deduplication and relevance scoring
opportunities.evidence: Multiple near-identical events with conflicting relevance scores (0.2 vs 0.95 for same change) indicate scoring algorithm could be refined
opportunities.suggestedAction: Consolidate duplicate events and normalize relevance scoring to eliminate 4x event volume overhead

opportunities.title: Automate security file verification
opportunities.evidence: Security.tsx changes detected; establishing automated verification could catch issues earlier in development cycle
opportunities.suggestedAction: Create pre-commit hook or CI step that auto-triggers security linting and tests for Security.tsx modifications

taskCandidates.title: Review Security.tsx changes
taskCandidates.description: Examine the code modifications to Security.tsx and verify they follow security best practices; check for any sensitive data exposure, authentication issues, or broken permission logic
taskCandidates.rationale: Active changes to security module require immediate human review; multiple event detections suggest significant modifications

taskCandidates.title: Run security test suite
taskCandidates.description: Execute all security-related tests to verify that changes to Security.tsx don't break authentication, authorization, or data protection mechanisms
taskCandidates.rationale: Security module changes must be validated to prevent production incidents

taskCandidates.title: Deduplicate code-observer events
taskCandidates.description: Implement event deduplication in code-observer to collapse events for the same file within a 100-200ms window; consolidate conflicting relevance scores
taskCandidates.rationale: Duplicate events reduce signal-to-noise ratio and suggest inefficient monitoring logic

recommendations.title: Prioritize human security review over automated checks
recommendations.rationale: Security.tsx is high-sensitivity; even low-probability risks need human validation before merge
recommendations.action: Block merge on Security.tsx changes until 2 security-trained reviewers approve

recommendations.title: Stabilize event deduplication before scaling monitoring
recommendations.rationale: Current 4x event duplication will create maintenance burden and false alerts as system scales
recommendations.action: Fix deduplication logic in code-observer before adding new file monitors

pendingApprovals.reason: Sensitive proactive task requires approval: Review Security.tsx changes
